texto: It is not easy to determine whether there are any who still adhere in good faith to the doctrine that traces back the depreciation of money to the activity of speculators. The doctrine is an indispensable instrument of the lowest form of demagogy
autor: it is the resource of governments in search of a scapegoat. There are scarcely any independent writers nowadays who defend it
explicacao: Citação de it is the resource of governments in search of a scapegoat. There are scarcely any independent writers nowadays who defend it sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It is not easy to determine whether there are any who still adhere in good faith to the doctrine …” articula reflexao, those-who-support-it-are-paid-to-do-so, doctrine em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
